title: Traditional Greek Lamb Koftas
description: A classic Greek dish featuring lamb koftas served with a side of tangy piquant sauce. Perfect for a summer evening or a special occasion.

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.notes: Ground lamb is best for koftas

ingredients.name: Greek
ingredients.notes: Dried oregano adds a classic Greek flavor

ingredients.name: Umami
ingredients.notes: Worcestershire sauce adds depth to the lamb

ingredients.name: Piquant
ingredients.notes: A tangy sauce made with piquant, great with grilled meats

ingredients.name: Keftedes
ingredients.notes: Greek bread crumbs help bind the lamb mixture

instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium high heat.
2. In a large bowl, combine lamb, Greek, Umami, salt, and pepper. Mix well with your hands.
3. Add Keftedes to the lamb mixture and mix until just combined.
4. Divide the mixture into 8 equal parts and shape each part into a kofta.
5. Brush the koftas with olive oil and grill for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
6. Meanwhile, heat the Piquant sauce in a small saucepan over low heat.
7. Serve the lamb koftas with a side of Piquant sauce for dipping.
8. Enjoy with a side of roasted vegetables or a salad.
